login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your Pawly account.
login.passwordResetSent: We've sent you a password reset email.
login.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email to reset your password.
login.inAppBrowserWarning: Google sign-in is blocked in Messenger/Instagram. Open this page in Chrome/Safari (⋯ → Open in browser), or sign in with email.
login.inAppBrowserInfo: You're in Messenger/Instagram. If Google sign-in doesn't work, open the page via "Open in external browser".

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create your Pawly account and start tracking your pet's health.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.passwordPolicyFailed: Password does not meet the requirements.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with upper and lower case letters and a digit
register.inAppBrowserWarning: Google registration doesn't work in Messenger/Instagram. Open the page in Chrome/Safari or use email and password.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}.
verify.instructions: Click the link in the email, then come back here and press "I verified".
verify.stillNotVerified: We still see an unverified state. Please try again shortly.
verify.verifiedSuccess: Your email has been verified. Redirecting you to the app…
verify.verifiedSignIn: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verify.linkExpired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
verify.linkInvalid: The verification link is invalid or has already been used.
verify.userDisabled: This account is disabled. Please contact support.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: For account {{email}}.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully.
resetPassword.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with upper and lower case letters and a digit
resetPassword.weakPassword: Password does not meet the security requirements (min 8 characters, upper and lower case letters and a digit).
resetPassword.linkExpired: The password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.linkInvalid: The link is invalid or has already been used.
resetPassword.userDisabled: This account is disabled. Please contact support.
resetPassword.failed: Password reset failed. Please try again.

errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet the security requirements (min 8 characters, upper and lower case letters and a digit).
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email to continue.
